data.title: 国际服主线Vol.5 第一章后篇PV公开
data.summary: [Main Story Update Notice] The second half of Main Story Vol. 5 Hyakkaryouran Chapter 1: "Like the F
data.body:
[Main Story Update Notice]

The second half of Main Story Vol. 5 Hyakkaryouran Chapter 1: "Like the Flower That Wishes to Bloom" has been revealed.

Sensei... Can the Hyakkaryouran really go back to the way it used to be?

⬇️Watch PV (HD)⬇️
https://youtu.be/cO5XtJ0TekE

#BlueArchive
